title: A resource from 3D electron microscopy of hippocampal neuropil for user training and tool development
abstract: Three volumes of hippocampal CA1 neuropil from adult rat imaged at ~2nm resolution, with all axons, dendrites, glia, and synapses reconstructed — the first densely reconstructed hippocampal volumes, released as an open resource for tool development.
notes: Open 3DEM dataset for training and benchmarking. Foundational resource.
